steps.flow: Create and publish a Flow, then add your Shopware storefront domain under Team → Allowed embed domains.
steps.placement: Add the BerryPath Flow element in Content → Shopping Experiences, or enter a Flow UUID in a product's BerryPath fields.
steps.settings: Configure the optional market, product ID source and assisted conversion measurement below.

berrypath-flow.label: BerryPath Flow
berrypath-flow.notConfigured: Enter a Flow UUID to render this widget in the storefront.

fields.flowTokenHelp: Copy the UUID from a published Flow in BerryPath.
fields.title: Title
fields.marketHelp: Optional. Falls back to the plugin's default market code.
fields.localeHelp: Optional. Falls back to the active storefront language.
